ohtani.title: Harper, Turner belt milestone homers in 10-7 win
ohtani.blurb: Bryce Harper crushes his 200th home run with the Phillies and Trea Turner hits his 200th career long ball to beat the Dodgers, 10-7

imanaga.title: Imanaga, Hoerner lead Cubs to 10-1 win
imanaga.blurb: Seven shutout innings from Shota Imanaga, and a two-hit, four-RBI day from Nico Hoerner propel the Cubs to a 10-1 win over the Twins

suzuki.title: Dillon Dinger's four hits help lift Tigers over Cubs
suzuki.blurb: Dillon Dinger leads the way with two home runs and the game's go-ahead RBI to give the Tigers a 8-6 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Caleb Durbin leads Red Sox to 14th straight win
yoshida.blurb: Caleb Durbin crushes a go-ahead home run to lift the Red Sox to their 14th straight victory with a 6-5 win over the Orioles

okamoto.title: Three homers back Nick Martinez in Rays' 7-1 win
okamoto.blurb: The Rays crush three home runs to back Nick Martinez's dominant six-inning start in the Rays' 7-1 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas leads the White Sox to a 10-3 win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas drives in two runs with a pair of doubles to lead the White Sox to a 10-3 win over the Rangers

matsui.title: Merrill, France power Padres past Royals
matsui.blurb: The Padres combine to hit five home runs and defeat the Royals in dominant fashion, 19-2
